menu.hint: Click/Space to drop • ESC to pause

gameover.title: GAME OVER
gameover.share_text: I just scored {{score}} (floor {{level}}) in Vietnam Street Stack!

intro.title: Welcome to Vietnam Street Stack!
intro.body: Stack floors as high as you can — without toppling the tower. Each run takes only a few minutes; you'll pick it up fast.

swing.title: Blocks swing horizontally
swing.body: Each floor slides left and right above the tower. Speed ramps up the higher you climb.

drop.title: Tap to drop
drop.body: Click, tap, or press Space to stop and drop the block. Timing is everything.

perfect.title: Perfect = score × combo
perfect.body: Land aligned with the floor below → Perfect (✨). 3 in a row triggers slow-mo + ×2/×3/×4/×5 score multiplier.

slice.title: Misses get shaved
slice.body: Any overhang falls off and the floor shrinks. Miss entirely → Game Over.

powerups.title: Power-up blocks
powerups.body: Every 8 floors a special block may appear: ↔ Wider • ⏱ Slow-Mo • ★ Magnet • ♥ Heal.

hud.title: Track your run
hud.body: Top HUD: 🏆 Score • Floor • Combo • ⏸ Pause. Settings lets you tune music/language.

themes.title: Unlock new themes
themes.body: Reach Floor 50 → Hue 🏯, Floor 100 → Da Nang 🌊, Floor 150 → Saigon 🌃. Each theme has its own sky.

desc.hanoi: Old Quarter at dawn, Tây Lake breeze.
desc.danang: Coastal breeze, Dragon Bridge glowing at night.
desc.saigon: Neon alleys at night, tropical heat.

leaderboard.title: LEADERBOARD
leaderboard.offline: Internet connection required to view the global leaderboard.
leaderboard.empty: No entries yet — be the first to submit a score!
leaderboard.no_rank_yet: No rank yet — play a round!

account.link_google_hint: Back up progress to the cloud
account.identity_conflict_body: This Google account is already attached to another profile. Sign in to that profile? Your current guest progress may be replaced.
account.username_too_short: Name must be at least 3 chars
account.username_too_long: Name must be at most 20 chars
account.username_taken: That name is already taken — try another.
account.username_invalid_chars: Allowed characters: letters, digits, underscore, dot, hyphen.
account.username_failed: Couldn't change name. Try again later.

consent.title: ALLOW ADS?
consent.body: This game shows Google AdSense to help cover hosting costs. You can change this later in Settings.
consent.note: Accepting lets Google use cookies for personalised ads (per Google's policies).
